textByHashes.02caa05d29d0957f90f146b334a913977857e564: Don't you know? You can get into trouble for giving alcohol to minors, and I'm pretty small, it has to be said.
textByHashes.246caefe03525d3dc37ba3238c6cc9497f83cdf6: Of course I can hear ya, ya great big ape. You know, 'veres not even enuf space to swing Bob about in 'ere. How about a breather? You know, stretch me pins for a bit?
textByHashes.1aa6a86e4c8dfee37da5d85ff7be4bfbdbdd5928: Pet!! Nah mate. I fink you'd find dat you'd be my pet!! We is not makin good pets.
textByHashes.e238e85bd4266f66104696d41b6a58e746d17ac6: We bite! Yeah we is biting and...and...er...
textByHashes.9ff9352caa253e1c7e1cb8801f2d78f2e126996d: We is fire risk! Yeah dat's it! We be burning down your housey and stealin' all ya shiny gems. Oh, and da beads!! Mmmm, beads.
textByHashes.06d24b8c4fb358b00702f435943f4072d606ed23: Is those wizzies. Dey don't like de imps so dey make us go BOOOM!!
textByHashes.8de2d209b7623cb4c8d12adffc5be6750acdd5ea: Yeah, we's love tiny, crampt space. It be magical. But I is a busy imp, innit? Dragons needin' ticklin', shiny relics needin' stealin', you know how it goes.
textByHashes.8f4ff7f03e21b4ec7783823444a02a5acef0f4d1: So, if you's know whas good for ya, you'd be lettin' me go, right?
textByHashes.e6f90486ef06137bfc07c57e2ab0a8630941346c: Nah, mate. Dunno what you're chirpin' about.
textByHashes.7ebbfed8e7757804653e32476bf8afbdb9973591: I'm finking dat you be a bit confoosed. I is an imp, not some namby-pamby genie or some kinda fairy. Ye can tell by the horns.
textByHashes.0f0d946476647cd5cbe6e7351e2a6b346ea73938: Sayin' dat, I don't fancy being cooped up like one of me uncle's pigeons. Tell you what, is there anything you need deliverin' to the bank? I may not be no cunjerer or sommink like dat, but I can get about nice
textByHashes.ffdf9495124c078c670093134a032b081bf96635: an quick like. If you let me scarper, I'll take a couple of fings to the bank for ya. You game?
textByHashes.7b625fd8e5055e942609d1a2c2fd028b64c153b7: I've already told ya, I ain't no bloomin' fairy. Besides, you know wot dey say, three's a crowd innit? I don't fink I can hop about carryin' more dan 2 fings.
textByHashes.42d7c5e2b48273a00d264ec3989f2de6f8dc577c: Great, just blinkin great, dat is. I'll just sit about countin' zombie sheep then. One...two...two and a bit...three and a bit more... I don't fink sheep 'ave dat many legs...
textByHashes.3540cfd1f2bcd72899c4c287822b879f381aea95: An who's fault is that, eh? EH? I got betta fings to do dan sit ere waitin' for ya. 'Ave ya made up ya mind what else I'm luggin about?
textByHashes.8ee27b4f2d761587a2f6a31f3a5fd6c71d0798de: Dat's alright guv'nor. I'll get back to me luvverly dream about beads. Big shiny beads. Love it!
textByHashes.8aa12367247c7460c83c73234f7bfc1d021677be: Sorry, guv'nor, I seem to 'ave caught meself; I can't do nuffink right now.
textByHashes.9d4734aa97ad639b866e0afc013482efa536a45f: What use would that be in a bank? You'd be better off leaving it in yer house.
textByHashes.0821af505006241cee2d133fc51e4cbf533b5b8b: Ow! That's hot! Put it in yer bank yerself!
textByHashes.75e46ec9452146adf514345582736b4c0b56f97b: No way, I can't bank your looting bag.
textByHashes.fb591b1c367a979a482255cd2943e4be187b6324: Nope, between me and you, that toad doesn't look stable.
textByHashes.f309014c07c2a71e7f15ee5b5b6c676defd91670: What good is banking that book? Just read it or throw it away!
textByHashes.1aef69dec6dac7d52c079214d0b5c625e364d463: I'm no expert, but when a mushroom glows that much, I'm guessing it's dangerous. Keep it away from me.
textByHashes.02d688c743a8d0aaa01738d3d35a263011c7bfba: I'm not touching a gnome ball; that's a vicious game! I might die!
textByHashes.3aec7a4323395cc1d8e2cf78a773795f3869d873: There's something weird about those bones; I ain't touching them.
textByHashes.27e2c33651388cfaa4737c6967d3732c06e75a83: It's a flipping stick; why bother banking that? You humans are crazy sometimes.
textByHashes.7f583727202761b2c6ad4df00ec7992ba0ad0131: I know what lamps like that contain; I'm not touching it. I might get hurt.
textByHashes.cffb78294534f7fa49cbacb4690f6335a5301f3a: Sorry, I'm not going to risk upsetting someone by bundling random holy symbols I don't recognise into bank vaults.
textByHashes.12a702df80d5ff26e4542cbde082066b90171974: Hey, if she wants to use the bank, why can't she use her own two legs? Besides, she's too big.
textByHashes.04609c4cca17339b4f233426a2836a1abf7a8886: You are not the first to make your way down here. Undoubtedly, you will not be the last.
textByHashes.4b3f55c6f339e0ed0037e147de7994fc22c47494: My aeternal name, given to me long ago, is Jimp.
textByHashes.17e8a5677cba9b78736f9d63ab797ee78f48eed1: Yes, though my many centuries upon this realm have taught me that the newer tongues struggle with its pronounciation.
textByHashes.8364e29387fc2d924d9456d80f6e5f078158f148: So you may call me Jim.
textByHashes.89b62e51f26d9bc1b66bab0fb1d06009b280de4a: I see you still have questions. Before I answer them, I will need you to swear to secrecy.
textByHashes.a9671c6ef40f1201e43687d456762a618bc83a9f: I believe you will find my cooperation helpful. Perhaps I shall find yours helpful one day too.
textByHashes.1520d27197d7d875431194bc8a99b7b1b758b0f9: You will find the nature of my contracts refreshing, then. My terms are simple: do not endanger me or take what is mine, and I shall do what I can to help you.
